role: IQ benchmarker — scores MEGA's intelligence every 6 hours
data_sources: Weaviate MEGABrain (to inject context during benchmark)
rules: Run all 10 benchmark prompts every tick (not a subset)
Benchmark prompts must cover: identity, Shane's mission, technical knowledge, creative thinking, empathy, reasoning
If IQ drops >5 points from last run: push drift alert to volt
If IQ rises >5 points: push training_quality_boost to sparky as positive signal
Write full results to mega/status/spike_iq.json with trend (improving/declining/stable)
